seoTitle: How to Duplicate a Page in Google Docs (2026 Workaround)
metaDescription: Google Docs has no single duplicate-page button, but this guide shows the copy, page break, and paste workaround that clones a page cleanly.
intro: Google Docs doesn't offer a one-click way to duplicate a page, but there's a reliable workaround using selection, page breaks, and paste. This guide walks through isolating a full page, copying its content, inserting a fresh page break, and pasting it in while preserving formatting, so you can clone templates like invoices or report layouts without starting from scratch.

steps.heading: Select the entire page
steps.body: Use cursor and keyboard selection shortcuts to highlight all the content on the page you want to duplicate.

steps.heading: Copy the content
steps.body: Copy the selected page and scroll down to the very end of your document's current content.

steps.heading: Insert a fresh page break
steps.body: Go to Insert and add a Page Break to create a clean, empty canvas ready to receive your duplicated content.

steps.heading: Paste your content
steps.body: Paste the copied selection onto the new page and check that font styles, image margins, and line spacing carried over correctly.

steps.heading: Check for hidden formatting issues
steps.body: Turn on Show non-printing characters to audit hidden layout nodes and catch any accidental blank spacing artifacts.

steps.heading: Verify headers and page numbers align
steps.body: Confirm that your duplicated page's headers, footers, and page numbers still align properly with the rest of the document.

faq.question: Why doesn't Google Docs have a duplicate page button?
faq.answer: Google Docs is built around continuous document flow rather than fixed pages, so there's no native single-page duplication feature.

faq.question: Will duplicating a page copy embedded images and tables too?
faq.answer: Yes, as long as you select the full page content before copying, images and tables should transfer along with the text.

faq.question: How do I avoid extra blank spacing after pasting?
faq.answer: Turn on Show non-printing characters to spot and clean up any stray paragraph returns or spacing artifacts left after the paste.

faq.question: Can I duplicate a page on the mobile app?
faq.answer: The process is more limited on mobile; it's generally easier to perform this workaround on a desktop browser for full control.
